resources.string: Paste or share a tweet/post here
Enable overlay permission and the accessibility service. After that, the app watches visible screen text, waits for the screen to settle, and automatically fact-checks what you are reading.
Manual test or last shared text
Use a backend endpoint like http://127.0.0.1:8080/factcheck. The app sends the visible text plus your API key to that backend and expects JSON with verdict, confidence, summary, and sources.
Reads visible screen text, falls back to OCR screenshots when needed, and shows a fact-check overlay while you browse posts or articles.
